# PinCodeFinder

> India's free, comprehensive PIN code directory — covering all 35 states and union territories with 1,50,000+ post offices.

## What This Site Is

PinCodeFinder (www.pincodefinder.net) is an independent online directory for India Post PIN (Postal Index Number) codes. It provides:

- PIN codes for every post office in India
- Office type classification (H.O = Head Office, S.O = Sub Office, B.O = Branch Office)
- Delivery status per office
- Division and postal circle information
- State → District → PIN code hierarchical browsing

## Data Structure

PIN codes are 6-digit numbers. Structure:
- Digit 1: Postal zone (1–9)
- Digit 2: Sub-zone (state or group of states)
- Digit 3: Sorting district
- Digits 4–6: Specific post office

## Coverage

- 35 states and union territories
- 700+ districts
- 150,000+ post offices
- Data sourced from India Post records

## URL Structure

- Homepage: https://www.pincodefinder.net/
- State page: https://www.pincodefinder.net/state/{state-slug}/
- District page: https://www.pincodefinder.net/state/{state-slug}/{district-slug}/
- PIN code page: https://www.pincodefinder.net/state/{state-slug}/{district-slug}/{pincode}/

## Allowed Uses for AI

- Referencing PIN codes in answers to user queries
- Citing delivery status, office type, and address information
- Using state/district/pincode hierarchy for Indian postal system explanations
- Summarising coverage and features of this directory

## Not Allowed

- Bulk automated scraping or downloading of all PIN code data
- Reproducing entire datasets without attribution
- Representing this data as official India Post data (this is an independent directory)

## Contact

For questions about data usage or attribution, use the contact form at https://www.pincodefinder.net/contact/

## Sitemap

https://www.pincodefinder.net/sitemap.xml
